description: Machine-readable registry of prompt assets for repo-local human-agent collaboration.

prompts.title: Ingest Source
prompts.purpose: ingest a new source into raw and article layers with repo-aware merge judgment
use_when: a new article, interview, paper note, or transcript should enter the repo

prompts.title: Markdown Source Ingest
prompts.purpose: classify and ingest a markdown source while preserving provenance and naming accuracy
use_when: the source already exists as a markdown file
the source comes from another workspace folder
inputs: why it should enter the repo
desired emphasis such as ingest compare merge or review

prompts.title: Ingest Review
prompts.purpose: review today's newly ingested articles for net-new signal merge pressure and structural impact
use_when: one or more new article cards were added or updated today
inputs: today's new or updated article cards

prompts.title: Compare Article To Existing
prompts.purpose: compare a new article against existing repo pages and decide whether it is net-new duplicate or revision pressure
use_when: a new source looks similar to existing articles or concepts
inputs: closest relevant pages in the repo

prompts.title: Topic Update
prompts.purpose: update a concept or map from a topic-first perspective rather than a single-article perspective
use_when: the user wants to advance a topic such as tool use memory evals or agent workflow
inputs: new source or batch of sources

prompts.title: Conflict Review
prompts.purpose: separate real conflicts from framing differences uncertainty and revision pressure
use_when: a new source appears to disagree with existing repo understanding
the user wants a conflict-focused review
inputs: relevant article concept and map pages

prompts.title: Repo Maintenance Review
prompts.purpose: review repo structure for cleanup merge opportunities and navigation improvements without ingesting new sources
use_when: there is no new source to ingest
the user wants to improve repo structure and navigability
